entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop used in the study to evaluate disease resistance and yield loss

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A fungal disease that affects chickpea yield

entities.name: A. RABIEI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for Ascochyta blight in chickpea

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity resulting from disease infection

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of chickpea lines to withstand or limit the impact of Ascochyta blight

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: The research methodology involving controlled trials in the field over three seasons

entities.name: ICARDA
entities.description: The International Center for Agricultural Research in the Dry Areas where the study was conducted

entities.name: TEL HADYA
entities.description: The specific location in Syria where the field experiments took place

entities.name: SYRIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: ILC 1929
entities.description: A specific chickpea line identified as susceptible to Ascochyta blight

entities.name: DISEASE RATING
entities.description: A numerical scale used to quantify the severity of Ascochyta blight infection
